MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

David J. Cook, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, SYSCO SAN FRANCISCO, INC., a California corporation.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) BALDO'S ORIGINAL MEXICAN FOOD, INC., a California corporation, dba BALDO'S ORIGINAL MEXICAN FOOD; ROSENDO A. FLORES, individually and dba BALDO'S ORIGINAL MEXICAN FOOD.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Declarations filed in support of Default Prove-up hearing are admitted in evidence.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $57,310.45
Pre-Judgment Interest at the annual rate of 10%: $2,731.80
Attorney's Fees: $1,750.00
Costs: $947.40
Total Judgment in the amount of $62,739.65
Judgment signed in open court.
